def positive_serialization_then_deserialization_between_adjacent_helpers():
    rule_id = "serialization_then_deserialization_between_adjacent_helpers"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag neighboring helpers that bounce data through serialized text or bytes without need."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
